Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.elementdesc

Class ElementDesc

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.elementdesc.ItemDesc
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.elementdesc.ElementDesc
All Implemented Interfaces:
IElementDesc
Direct Known Subclasses:
NullElementDesc
public class ElementDesc extends ItemDesc implements IElementDesc
This interface is used for declaring how to display an element

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ElementDesc(IElementType<?> elementType, String prefix, String childrenSuffix, IImageProvider imgProvider, AttributeDesc[] attributeDesc, AttributeDesc[] atColumn, IElementRelationship[] childRelationships, String autoNamePrefix, AttributeDesc autoNameAttribute, int defaultColumn, IElementPrettyPrinter prettyPrinter)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AttributeDesc
    atColumn(int i)
    Return the description of the attribute at column i, or null if the given index is below 0 or exceeds the number of columns for the given element description.
    IAttributeDesc
    getAttributeDescription(String attributeTypeId)
    Get the attribute description given its id.
    AttributeDesc[]
    getAttributeDescriptions()
    Return an array of descriptions which correspond to all attributes which the element of this description can carry.
    AttributeDesc
    getAutoNameAttribute()
    Get the description corresponding to the attribute which cares about the automatic naming of the element.
    String
    getAutoNamePrefix()
    Return the automatic name prefix.
    IElementRelationship[]
    getChildRelationships()
    Returns the ordered list of child relationship for which the element type concerned by this description is the parent.
    String
    getChildrenSuffix()
    The suffix for the last child of the element
    IInternalElementType<?>[]
    getChildTypes()
    Return the ordered list of child element types of the element type concerned by this description.
    int
    getDefaultColumn()
    Returns the column which shall be edited by default for the given element description.
    IInternalElementType<?>
    getElementType()
    Return the element type concerned by this description or null if this description does not correspond to an internal element.
    IImageProvider
    getImageProvider()
    Return the image provider which will be used to display an icon for elements concerned by this description.
    IImplicitChildProvider
    getImplicitChildProvider(IInternalElementType<?> childType)
    Returns the implicit child provider for the given child type.
    String
    getPrefix(IInternalElementType<?> childType)
    Return the prefix that shall be displayed before the first child of the element corresponding to this description which has the given type, or the default prefix for the current element if the given parameter type childType is null.
    IElementPrettyPrinter
    getPrettyPrinter()
    Returns the pretty printer for the display of the element in the pretty print view.
    boolean
    isSelectable(int i)
    Tells if the attribute at column index i can be selected.
    boolean
    isValid()
    Tells whether this element UI description is a valid registered element description, or if it corresponds to a null instance.

    getPrefix

    • ElementDesc

      public ElementDesc(IElementType<?> elementType, String prefix, String childrenSuffix, IImageProvider imgProvider, AttributeDesc[] attributeDesc, AttributeDesc[] atColumn, IElementRelationship[] childRelationships, String autoNamePrefix, AttributeDesc autoNameAttribute, int defaultColumn, IElementPrettyPrinter prettyPrinter)

  • Method Details

    • getChildrenSuffix

      public String getChildrenSuffix()
      The suffix for the last child of the element
      Specified by:
      getChildrenSuffix in interface IElementDesc
      Returns:
      suffix that shall be display after the last child of the element

    • getImageProvider

      public IImageProvider getImageProvider()
      Return the image provider which will be used to display an icon for elements concerned by this description.
      Returns:
      an image provider for the elements concerned by this description

    • getAttributeDescriptions

      public AttributeDesc[] getAttributeDescriptions()
      Description copied from interface: IElementDesc
      Return an array of descriptions which correspond to all attributes which the element of this description can carry.
      Specified by:
      getAttributeDescriptions in interface IElementDesc
      Returns:
      an array of IAttributeDesc. This must not be null.

    • atColumn

      public AttributeDesc atColumn(int i)
      Return the description of the attribute at column i, or null if the given index is below 0 or exceeds the number of columns for the given element description.
      Parameters:
      i - the index of the column to get the attribute description for
      Returns:
      the description of the attribute at column i, or null if the given index is out of range

    • getDefaultColumn

      public int getDefaultColumn()
      Returns the column which shall be edited by default for the given element description.
      Returns:
      the default column to edit

    • isSelectable

      public boolean isSelectable(int i)
      Tells if the attribute at column index i can be selected.
      Parameters:
      i - the index of the attribute to be checked
      Returns:
      true if the attribute at column i can be selected, false otherwise

    • getChildTypes

      public IInternalElementType<?>[] getChildTypes()
      Description copied from interface: IElementDesc
      Return the ordered list of child element types of the element type concerned by this description.
      Specified by:
      getChildTypes in interface IElementDesc
      Returns:
      the ordered list of element types which are in a child relationship with the element type of the current element description

    • getChildRelationships

      public IElementRelationship[] getChildRelationships()
      Returns the ordered list of child relationship for which the element type concerned by this description is the parent.
      Returns:
      the ordered list of element relationship whose parent is the element type of the current element description

    • getAutoNamePrefix

      public String getAutoNamePrefix()
      Description copied from interface: IElementDesc
      Return the automatic name prefix.
      Specified by:
      getAutoNamePrefix in interface IElementDesc
      Returns:
      the string prefix for the automatic naming of the element

    • getAutoNameAttribute

      public AttributeDesc getAutoNameAttribute()
      Description copied from interface: IElementDesc
      Get the description corresponding to the attribute which cares about the automatic naming of the element.
      Specified by:
      getAutoNameAttribute in interface IElementDesc
      Returns:
      the attribute description of the automatic naming attribute

    • getPrettyPrinter

      public IElementPrettyPrinter getPrettyPrinter()
      Returns the pretty printer for the display of the element in the pretty print view.
      Returns:
      the pretty printer for the element of this description.

    • getAttributeDescription

      public IAttributeDesc getAttributeDescription(String attributeTypeId)
      Description copied from interface: IElementDesc
      Get the attribute description given its id. Returns null if no such attribute type can be carried by the element considered by the current element description, or if there is no attribute description for it.
      Specified by:
      getAttributeDescription in interface IElementDesc
      Parameters:
      attributeTypeId - the id of the attribute type
      Returns:
      the UI description of the attribute, or null if such an attribute is not allowed or is not described.

    • isValid

      public boolean isValid()
      Description copied from interface: IElementDesc
      Tells whether this element UI description is a valid registered element description, or if it corresponds to a null instance.
      Specified by:
      isValid in interface IElementDesc
      Returns:
      true is this description is a valid registered UI description, false otherwise.

    • getImplicitChildProvider

      public IImplicitChildProvider getImplicitChildProvider(IInternalElementType<?> childType)
      Description copied from interface: IElementDesc
      Returns the implicit child provider for the given child type. If no provider was contributed to the editorItems extension point, then a default implementation that provides no child is returned.
      Specified by:
      getImplicitChildProvider in interface IElementDesc
      Returns:
      the provider for implicit children of the given type

    • getElementType

      public IInternalElementType<?> getElementType()
      Description copied from interface: IElementDesc
      Return the element type concerned by this description or null if this description does not correspond to an internal element.
      Specified by:
      getElementType in interface IElementDesc
      Returns:
      the element type concerned by this description or null if this description does not correspond to an internal element.

    • getPrefix

      public String getPrefix(IInternalElementType<?> childType)
      Description copied from interface: IElementDesc
      Return the prefix that shall be displayed before the first child of the element corresponding to this description which has the given type, or the default prefix for the current element if the given parameter type childType is null.
      Specified by:
      getPrefix in interface IElementDesc
      Returns:
      the prefix that shall be displayed before the first child of the element with childType type, or the default prefix for the element if childType is null
